texto: Happiness is something that you cannot see. It is naturally felt. When you feel it, you wouldn't wanna let go of it. It makes you smile. It keeps you going. It gives you the energy that nothing and nobody can give. Ig pushes to do things that renders positive vibe inside. Happiness is felt in the most unexpected time and place. It's a natural phenomenon.
explicacao: Citação de Nio Noveno sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Happiness is something that you cannot see. It is naturally felt. When you feel it, you wouldn't …” articula felicidade, awakenings, happiness em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como termino e happiness.
